sell_your_car_page.text_s_1: There are no fees to auction and sell your car with NoLemons. Even better, there are lots of benefits:
sell_your_car_page.text_s_2: Got a car that we can help sell on No Lemons? Fill in the form below andwe’ll get in touch.
sell_your_car_page.name: Name

intro.list_title: At NoLemons we want to help you:
intro.list_1: 1. Maximize the chance your car sells
intro.list_2: 2. Get you a great price for your car
intro.list_3: 3. Save you time and unnecessary stress
intro.text_1: We aim to give as much information as possible upfront to buyers. That way buyers are able to fully evaluate your car online.
intro.text_2_2: 3 steps before your car can go live on auction.

section_1.title: 1. Garage Inspection
section_1.text_1: New vehicles under warranty do not require the inspection
section_1.text_2: Most cars we list are used and well beyond the coverage of a factory warranty. As such, we usually require a pre-purchase inspection at one of our partner garages. Why?
section_1.list_item_1: Being honest and transparent. This actually increases the number of offers you will receive.
section_1.list_item_2: Honesty is the only policy. We don’t require your car to be perfect or fault-free. It’s perfectly fine to sell with NoLemons even if the car needs some work.
section_1.list_item_3: Buyer’s deserve to know the full story. Sellers don’t want any last minute negotiations or worse a buyer back out.
section_1.list_item_4: NoLemons works with multiple garages and we prefer specialists whenever available.
section_1.list_item_5: Vehicles with a valid warranty are usually exempt

section_2.title: 2. Professional Photography
section_2.text_1: We work with several automotive photographers who have experience with shooting enthusiast cars. Your car will get up to 100 photos and 4-5 videos. Why?
section_2.list_item_1: To show everything a buyer might want to know – online
section_2.list_item_2: Our photographers can meet you at multiple locations. Sometimes we can even shoot at your home (if you have a suitable location).

section_3.title: 3. Creating Your Vehicle Post
section_3.text_1: Our team of writers will prepare and organize your post from A to Z. All you have to do is provide us the info and share documents.
section_3.list_item_1: Your car’s story: How long you’ve had it, what you’ve done to it and more
section_3.list_item_2: Ownership documents (vehicle registration card, title or similar)
section_3.list_item_3: Past service and maintenance records (dealer and garage)
section_3.list_item_5: Past repair and accident repair bills (if applicable)
section_3.text_2: Please share copies/photos of any of the above. The more the merrier.

section_4.title: How Do I Get Started?
section_4.list_item_1: We will send you contact details to set up appointments for your garage inspection and photography session.
section_4.list_item_1_1: Choose the earliest date and time that works for you.

list_item_2.1: Send any information, documents (see Step 3) to

section_4.list_item_3: Remember, first come first served. The faster you complete these steps the earlier your car goes live!

list_item_4.title: Important
list_item_4.1: Your car cannot be sold externally during the auction.
list_item_4.2: Your car cannot be advertised on any websites, pages or channels. Any ads must be removed before proceeding.
list_item_4.3: Our team will manage all buyer communication on your behalf
